detaileddescription.para: Reset cause string "POR"|"PIN"|"WDT"|"SWR"|"LCK"|"OFF"|"DBG"

briefdescription.para: Battery Voltage 1 [mV] V = mV * (10 + 4.7) / 4.7.
Battery Voltage 2 [mV] V = mV * (10 + 4.7) / 4.7.
[mV] VDD dectection V = mV * (10 + 4.7) / 4.7
[mV] internal ADC VDD
[mV]
[degrees celsius]
[dBm]
[sec]
[sec]
[sec]
[sec]
[msec]
[bytes]
[bytes]
[bytes]
the metrics JSON string
external sensor [degrees celsius]
external sensor [RH]
15-digit IMSI number
the boot count
The counted HW errors.
The error status of the acceleration sensor.
Version of the configuration.
Activation threshold for ADXL37x sensor.

detaileddescription.para: Deactivation threshold for ADXL37x sensor

briefdescription.para: Flag indicating that displacement calculation is disabled (15 sec raw data storage)
Flag indicating that raw data transfer to backend is enabled.
Flag indicating that displacement data transfer to backend is enabled.
Pulic key for raw and displacement data transfer to backend.

detaileddescription.para: Metrics transmission interval
Activation threshold for displacement calculation and raw/displacement data transmission

briefdescription.para: Maximum raw data transmissions per day.
Metric builder constructor.

detaileddescription.para: The constructor initiates the private variable payload, representing the metrics JSON string with opening curly bracket.

briefdescription.para: Metric builder destructor.

detaileddescription.para: The destructor is never called and is implemented only for completion reasons. It simply triggers a debug message on info debug level.

briefdescription.para: Add function to append modem temeperature to metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message (pool element)
The message payload will be extracted, casted to 32 bit integer value, converted to a string and stored in private member variable mdm_temp. Writing the variable value into JSON string is part of member function finalize.

briefdescription.para: Add function to append modem battery voltage to metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message (pool element)
The message payload will be extracted, casted to 32 bit integer value, converted to a string and stored in private member variable mdm_batv. Writing the variable value into JSON string is part of member function finalize.

briefdescription.para: Add function to append modem link quality to metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message (pool element)
The message payload will be extracted, converted to a string and stored in private member variable mdm_link. Writing the variable value into JSON string is part of member function finalize.

briefdescription.para: Add function to append modem battery voltage to metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message (pool element)
The message payload will be extracted, casted to structure psm_timer and stored in local varaible psm_act. The variable psm_act->tau will be converted to a string and stored in private member variable psm_tau. The variable psm_act->active_time will be converted to a string and stored in private member variable psm_active. Writing the variable value into JSON string is part of member function finalize.

briefdescription.para: Add function to append modem DRX to metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message (pool element)
The message payload will be extracted, casted to structure lte_lc_edrx_cfg and stored in local varaible eDRX. The variable eDRX->edrx will be converted to a string and stored in private member variable edrx_time. The variable eDRX->ptw will be converted to a string and stored in private member variable edrx_ptw. Writing the variable value into JSON string is part of member function finalize. NOT USED
Add function to append IMSI to metrics JSON string

pElem
Pointer to the received message (pool element)
The message payload will be extracted, converted to a string and stored in private member variable imsi. Writing the variable value into JSON string is part of member function finalize.

briefdescription.para: Add function to append reset cause to metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message (pool element)
The message payload will be extracted, converted to a string and stored in private member variable reset_cause. Writing the variable value into JSON string is part of member function finalize.

briefdescription.para: Add function to append boot counter to metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message (pool element)
The message payload will be extracted, casted to 32 bit integer value, converted to a string and stored in private member variable boot_cnt. Writing the variable value into JSON string is part of member function finalize.

briefdescription.para: Add function to append temperature of external sensor to metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message (pool element)
The message payload will be extracted, casted to structure sensor_value and stored in local varaible val. The variable val will be converted to a float value by calling function sensor_value_to_double, converted to a string and stored in private member variable temperature. Writing the variable value into JSON string is part of member function finalize.

briefdescription.para: Add function to append humidity of external sensor to metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message (pool element)
The message payload will be extracted, casted to structure sensor_value and stored in local varaible val. The variable val will be converted to a float value by calling function sensor_value_to_double, converted to a string and stored in private member variable humidity. Writing the variable value into JSON string is part of member function finalize.

briefdescription.para: Add function to append HW status information to metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message (pool element)
The message payload will be extracted, casted to structure hw_metrics and stored in local varaible hw_m. The variable hw_m-> num_errors will be converted to a string and stored in private member variable num_hw_errors. The variable hw_m->hw_status will be will be checked if the value is enumeration eHwOK. In this case the the string "adxl37x_ok" will be assigned to private member variable adxl_status. If the value is not eHwOK, the string "adxl37x_fail" will be assigned to private member variable adxl_status. Writing the variable value into JSON string is part of member function finalize.

briefdescription.para: Add function to append prepared metrics data to the metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para:
pElem
Pointer to the received message (pool element)
According to the message type of the message one of the specific add functions of the class will be called.

briefdescription.para: Setter function to set private string variable config_version.

detaileddescription.para:
s
The string to be set
The function set the private string variable config_version to value of parameter s.

briefdescription.para: Setter function to set private string variable act_thres.

detaileddescription.para:
s
The string to be set
The function set the private string variable act_thres to value of parameter s.

briefdescription.para: Setter function to set private string variable deact_thres.

detaileddescription.para:
s
The string to be set
The function set the private string variable deact_thres to value of parameter s.

briefdescription.para: Setter function to set private string variable disp_mode_off.

detaileddescription.para:
s
The string to be set
The function set the private string variable disp_mode_off to value of parameter s.

briefdescription.para: Setter function to set private string variable raw_transfer_on.

detaileddescription.para:
s
The string to be set
The function set the private string variable raw_transfer_on to value of parameter s.

briefdescription.para: Setter function to set private string variable disp_transfer_on.

detaileddescription.para:
s
The string to be set
The function set the private string variable disp_transfer_on to value of parameter s.

briefdescription.para: Setter function to set private string variable pubkey.

detaileddescription.para:
s
The string to be set
The function set the private string variable pubkey to value of parameter s.

briefdescription.para: Setter function to set Metrics transmission interval.

detaileddescription.para:
s
The string to be set
The function set the private string variable interval to value of parameter s.

briefdescription.para: Setter function to set private string variable raw_thres.

detaileddescription.para:
s
The string to be set
The function set the private string variable raw_thres to value of parameter s.

briefdescription.para: Setter function to set private string variable max_raw_per_day.

detaileddescription.para:
s
The string to be set
The function set the private string variable max_raw_per_day to value of parameter s.

briefdescription.para: Scaling of incoming battery voltage from AD converter.

detaileddescription.para:
ad_in
incoming battery voltage from AD converter
returns the scaled battery voltage
The function scales the incoming battery voltage from AD converter with following formula: res = ad_in * VOLTAGE_DIVIDER_FACTOR Result will be casted to 32 bit integer and returned

briefdescription.para: Function to finalize the metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para: The function retrieves the current system uptime by calling function k_uptime_get and convert it to seconds. Then the key value pairs will be appended to private string variable payload, which represents the metrics JSON string. Finally the metrics JSON string will be terminated with closing curly bracket.

briefdescription.para: Function clear all private string variables related to metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para: The function clear all private string variables related to metrics JSON string, except mdm_link and psm_tau, because there will be no update if the if values remains stable. Variable payload will be reinitializes with opening curly bracket.

briefdescription.para: isComplete function to check if the metrics JSON string is completly filled

detaileddescription.para:
returns true if metrics JSON string is complete, false otherwise
The function checks if the metrics JSON string is completly filled and all metrics data is present. Therefor it checks if battery voltage, temperature and internal supply voltage is present by checking taht size is greater than 0. Firthermore it checks the size of LTE temperature and humidity. Other requested metrics will not be checked. Here the implcit knowledge that LTE temperature and humidity request are the last requests, so that every other requested data still must be received.
Changing the order of requested metrics information can result in lost of metrics data.

briefdescription.para: Print function to output the metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para: The function prints the private string variable payload, using debug message with debug level INFO.

briefdescription.para: Getter function to retrieve the metrics JSON string.

detaileddescription.para:
Returns the private string variable payload
The function returns the private string variable payload, which represents the metrics JSON string.

briefdescription.para: Metrics builder helper class.

simplesect.title: Detailed Description
simplesect.para: The metrics builder helper class provides methods to create the metrics JSON string, which will be send via LTE with topic /device/DEVICE_ID/metric/update to the MQTT broker.
